title: U.S.-Iran airstrikes intensify as Tehran says deal is in ‘crisis phase’
summary_full: Iran has claimed control of the Strait of Hormuz and declared it closed, imperiling negotiations that the Iranian Foreign Ministry says are continuing.
summary_public: Iran has claimed control of the Strait of Hormuz and declared it closed, imperiling negotiations that the Iranian Foreign Ministry says are continuing.

IR.label: negative
